CityMapSection.subtitle: Navigieren Sie durch Dubais kulinarische Topographie. Von den architektonischen Höhen der Innenstadt bis zu den Küstennarrativen der Marina.

FeatureGrid.title: Service neu definieren.
FeatureGrid.subtitle: Eine vollständige Suite digitaler Tools für den modernen Gast.
FeatureGrid.feature1Desc: Echtzeit-Reservierungssystem mit sofortiger Bestätigung und digitalem Concierge-Support.
FeatureGrid.feature2Desc: Schalten Sie hochpräzise kulinarische Fotografie und Hinter-den-Kulissen-Galerie frei.
FeatureGrid.feature3Desc: Redaktionelle Bewertungen von Dubais erfahrensten Gastrokritikern.
FeatureGrid.feature4Desc: Rund um die Uhr dedizierte Leitung für unsere Elite-Mitglieder zur Verwaltung von Buchungen.

MetricSection.title: Einführung des Curation Pulse.
MetricSection.subtitle: Stellen Sie sich vor, die Atmosphäre eines Restaurants zu kennen, bevor Sie überhaupt eintreten. Unser proprietäres 50-Punkte-Inspektionssystem quantifiziert Luxus, Service und Konsistenz.
MetricSection.metric1Desc: Wir gleichen Tausende von verifizierten Gästebewertungen ab, um den Echtzeit-Ruf eines Establishments zu bestimmen.
MetricSection.metric2Desc: Unsere geheimen Kuratoren besuchen Veranstaltungsorte zu verschiedenen Zeiten der Woche, um sicherzustellen, dass die Qualität nie nachlässt.

AppDownload.label: Mobile Erfahrung

AppDownload.subtitle: Die Dubai Restaurants App bringt unsere gesamte redaktionelle Datenbank und das Reservierungssystem an Ihre Fingerspitzen.

CuisineDetail.subtitle: Discover the most prestigious {cuisine} dining destinations in Dubai. Hand-curated by our editorial team for exceptional quality and authentic flavor.

Cuisines.label: Heritage Registry
Cuisines.title: Global Tastes.
Cuisines.subtitle: Explore Dubai's culinary topography through the lens of global heritage. Every category a portal to a different world.

items.italian: From hand-rolled pasta to wood-fired Neapolitan perfection.
items.japanese: Precision, purity, and the finest seasonal seafood.
items.indian: A tapestry of spices redefining subcontinental heritage.
items.lebanese: Coastal fresh mezze and contemporary Levant narratives.
items.french: The foundation of fine dining, reimagined for the desert.

RestaurantListing.label: Editorial Selection
RestaurantListing.title: The Restaurants.
RestaurantListing.subtitle: An uncompromising collection of Dubai's finest culinary destinations. curated, verified, and updated weekly.
RestaurantListing.partnerSubtitle: Create your listing in simple steps. You can choose a Free plan or a Paid plan.

ChefListing.label: Culinary Artisans
ChefListing.title: The Masters.
ChefListing.subtitle: A curated directory of the visionary minds redefining Dubai's gastronomic landscape. From Michelin legends to local avant-garde pioneers.
ChefListing.journalSubtitle: Explore in-depth interviews, exclusive recipes, and the manifestos behind Dubai's most influential kitchens.

al-mahara.name: Al Mahara
al-mahara.description: An underwater dining experience within the Burj Al Arab, featuring world-class seafood curated by Michelin-star chefs.
al-mahara.longDescription: Designed by award-winning architects, the lounge features a seamless flow between indoor opulence and an outdoor terrace that seems to float above the city lights. Every detail, from the hand-blown crystal fixtures to the bespoke velvet furnishings, has been curated to create an atmosphere of effortless luxury.

ossiano.name: Ossiano
ossiano.description: Redefining the molecular landscape of contemporary heritage. A masterclass in sensory storytelling and contemporary mastery.

tresind-studio.name: Tresind Studio
tresind-studio.description: Exploring the vast landscape of Indian culinary art through a high-fidelity molecular lens.

crystal-lounge.name: The Crystal Lounge
crystal-lounge.description: A refined space where architectural elegance meets avant-garde culinary fusion.
crystal-lounge.longDescription: Located in the heart of Downtown Dubai, The Crystal Lounge offers a sensory journey through modern fusion cuisine. The space is a masterpiece of light and glass, providing an intimate setting for those who seek the extraordinary.

al-maha.name: Al-Maha Crystal Lounge
al-maha.description: An avant-garde exploration of Levantine flavors, elevated by panoramic skyline views and architectural precision.
al-maha.longDescription: Designed by award-winning architects, the lounge features a seamless flow between indoor opulence and an outdoor terrace that seems to float above the city lights. Every detail, from the hand-blown crystal fixtures to the bespoke velvet furnishings, has been curated to create an atmosphere of effortless luxury.

deans-cheesecake.name: Dean's Cheesecake
deans-cheesecake.description: Authentic artisan cheesecakes with a modern Dubai twist.
deans-cheesecake.longDescription: Dean's Cheesecake is a tribute to the art of baking. Each cake is handcrafted with precision, using the finest local ingredients to create a taste that is both familiar and revolutionary.

primos-pizza.name: Primo's Pizza & Grill
primos-pizza.description: Traditional Italian wood-fired pizza in the heart of Dubai Marina.
primos-pizza.longDescription: At Primo's, we believe in the simplicity of Italian flavors. Our pizzas are made from century-old recipes, baked in a traditional wood-fired oven for that perfect crust.

tijuana-flare.name: Tijuana Flare
tijuana-flare.description: Vibrant Mexican street food elevated for the sophisticated palate.
tijuana-flare.longDescription: Tijuana Flare brings the soul of Mexican street food to Downtown Dubai. Experience bold spices, fresh ingredients, and a festive atmosphere that captures the essence of Mexico.

zuma.name: Zuma
zuma.description: Sophisticated Japanese izakaya-style dining in a high-fidelity setting.
zuma.longDescription: Zuma Dubai offers a unique Japanese dining experience, blending traditional techniques with modern presentation. Located in the heart of DIFC, it is a staple of Dubai's luxury dining scene.

nobu-dubai.name: Nobu Dubai
nobu-dubai.description: Cutting-edge Japanese cuisine blended with Peruvian influences.
nobu-dubai.longDescription: Nobu Dubai at Atlantis The Palm is a world-renowned destination. Experience Chef Nobu Matsuhisa's legendary fusion of Japanese and Peruvian flavors in a stunning setting.

atmosphereHighlights.tableDesc: Hand-crafted ceramic dinnerware and linen settings tailored for this specific venue.
atmosphereHighlights.vybeDesc: A curated acoustic landscape blending deep house with traditional Levantine instrumentation.

scallop.name: Saffron Crystal Scallop
scallop.desc: Hand-dived scallops with a high-clarity saffron infusion.

lamb.name: Levantine Lamb Rack
lamb.desc: 12-hour slow braise with a pomegranate glaze.

baklava.name: The Gold Leaf Baklava
baklava.desc: 24k gold leaf accent with pistachio cream.

RestaurantDetail.claimDesc: If you own this restaurant, claim it now and choose a Free or Paid plan.

marcus-vane.name: Chef Marcus Vane
marcus-vane.quote: Crafting narratives through taste and atmosphere.

gregoire-berger.name: Chef Gregoire Berger
gregoire-berger.quote: Ocean-inspired narratives served within an underwater sanctuary.

himanshu-saini.name: Chef Himanshu Saini
himanshu-saini.quote: Reinventing Indian heritage through a lens of modern molecular gastronomy.

alessandro-rossi.name: Chef Alessandro Rossi
alessandro-rossi.quote: The beauty of food is in the precision of its craft.

mohamad-orfali.name: Chef Mohamad Orfali
mohamad-orfali.quote: A journey of flavors that bridge cultures.

onboarding.title: List your restaurant in a few simple steps
onboarding.subtitle: This onboarding is for restaurants and partners. Fill your details, choose a plan, and finish setup.
onboarding.claimPrompt: If your restaurant is already in our admin-uploaded database, you can claim it instead.
onboarding.planDesc: Pick a plan for this listing. You can upgrade or downgrade later.

guideSteps.3: 4. Finish and access your partner dashboard.

onboarding.alreadyInDbDesc: Ask admin for your restaurant slug, then open /claim/your-slug to claim and choose your plan.

onboarding.label: Chef Onboarding
onboarding.underReviewDesc: Your chef profile has been submitted and is awaiting admin verification. You'll receive access to your dashboard once approved.
onboarding.whoAreYouDesc: Select your role to begin the right onboarding process.
onboarding.chefRoleDesc: Build your chef profile, link venues, and showcase your culinary work.
onboarding.restaurantRoleDesc: List your venue, manage your profile, and reach new diners in Dubai.
onboarding.buildProfileDesc: Use clear details, then choose your plan. This helps guests trust your profile quickly.
onboarding.freePlanDesc: Basic chef profile and restaurant linking.
onboarding.proPlanDesc: Priority chef placement and premium story sections.

Account.journalDesc: Explore your personal history with Dubai's culinary landscape. Your verified bookings, hidden gem discoveries, and elite preferences.
Account.benefitsDesc: As an elite member, you have early access to new restaurant openings and private tasting menus.
